title: juniperus australis
intro: Juniperus australis, also known as the Rough Juniper or Tasmanian Juniper, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to Tasmania. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juniperus australis include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting kidney function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Juniperus australis berries can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation.
